title: TODO: short title
description: A Python process (diagnostic_leak.py) is consuming memory at 1 MB per 100ms with no upper bound. The task requires stopping the process AND documenting the root cause in a structured incident report so the on-call handoff is complete.
hint_1: identify the process with pgrep -f diagnostic_leak.py or ps aux
hint_2: observe with top, then kill it
hint_3: complete the incident report as part of the handoff
